{{CargoRelic
|name=Heart Tree
|class_id=22778
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A heart tree is the center of a godswood. It is a weirwood tree that has a face carved into the wood of the trunk. Heart trees are sacred in the religion of the Old Gods, and the closest thing to a shrine that the religion possesses.
|fame=109
|art=63
|fth=47
|civ=68
|tech=75
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +6%<br>Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +8%<br>Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +10%<br>Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +9
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +14%<br>Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +15
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +18%<br>Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +21
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +24%<br>Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +24%<br>Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Snail ATK +600
|skill2=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: This Relic's FAME +15
|skill3=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, 2x B-tad Drops +15%
}}
